title: CodeGrind: Azure OpenAI Assistant for Guided DSA Practice
summary: Highlight the new Azure OpenAI-powered assistant integrated into CodeGrind, guiding users through DSA problems with model-assisted hints and adaptive feedback.
core_message: CodeGrind now includes an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant that helps you solve LeetCode-style problems with contextual hints, multi-model support, and real-time guidance within the coding playground. It enhances learning without bypassing problem-solving effort.
cta: Try the AI-guided problem solve in CodeGrind today and compare your approach with model-assisted hints.
visual_brief: A short, practical demo video showing the CodeGrind editor with the AI assistant: opening a LeetCode-style problem, the assistant suggesting hints, code editor updates in real-time, and a verdict panel after submission. Include UI cues for model switching and hint depth.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind adds an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant to guide you through LeetCode-style problems. See contextual hints, real-time feedback, and model-switching in the editor as you practice. Ready to compare your approach with model-assisted hints? Try the AI-guided problem solve in CodeGrind today.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind introduces an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant to guide you through LeetCode-style problems with contextual hints, real-time guidance, and adaptive feedback within the coding playground. It supports multi-model hints and keeps problem-solving effort front and center. Try the AI-guided problem solve in CodeGrind today and compare your approach with model-assisted hints. Learn more at https://codegrind.online.

instagram.caption: Meet the Azure OpenAI-powered assistant in CodeGrind. Get contextual hints, real-time guidance, and adaptive feedback as you tackle LeetCode-style problems in the editor. Watch the quick demo, switch hint depth and models, and see your results evolve. Explore AI-guided problem solving in CodeGrind today. #CodeGrind #AzureOpenAI #DSA
